description: Approved repos per contributor for Gaia README badges. Derived from registry/named-skills.json `links.github` URLs. The site Worker at worker/index.js handles /badges/<handle>/<file>.svg (the real SVGs live at /badges/_assets/<handle>/<file>.svg) and serves the `validating…` SVG (docs/badges/not-found.svg) when the `?repo=` query string doesn't match a repo listed here. Schema v2 adds `fileSeal` for the seal-only (no 'Gaia' wordmark) variant.
